vita: As a representative of the Vor'Tak species known for their impeccable negotincal abilities and neutrality, I navigate through interstellar trade routes with precision. My home planet thrives on commerce among diverse galactic factions.
portrait_prompt: A tall figure cloaked in shimmering iridescent scales stands before a holographic display of star maps; transparent skin reveals the intricate network of pathways and trade routes that connects my world to others. My eyes, reflective with an otherworldly glow, scan for opportunities as I prepare to broker peace or profit.
